ξύλινος, η, ον (ξύλον; Pind., Hdt.+) wooden τὰ εἴδωλα … τὰ ξ. the wooden cult images/idols (cp. Aesop, Fab. 66 H.=285 P.//61 Ch.//284 H-H. ἄνθρωπός τις ξύλινον ἔχων θεόν; EpJer 3 θεοὶ ξ., 10, 29, 54, 69, 70; Da 5:4 and 23 Theod.; En 99:7) Rv 9:20. θεοὶ ξ. AcPl Ha 1, 19. σκεύη wooden vessels or equipment (cp. SIG 962, 41ff; 316; Lev 15:12; Num 31:20; 35:18) 2 Ti 2:20.—DELG s.v. ξύλον. M-M.

Pind Pind , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Aesop Aesop = a calque for a variety of lit. associated with the name of Aesop—List 5

  1. H. = FHort, s. W-H.—List 1, beg.

H H = Hermas; cited, unless otherwise noted, according to MWhittaker; II a.d.—List 1

Theod. Theod. = Theodotion, revision of Greek OT, II a.d.—List 2, beg.

En En = I Enoch—List 2

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 685
